Alexandre-Evariste Fragonard

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
La Sagesse
by Alexandre-Evariste Fragonard
France, 19th century · late 18th- early 19th century · Graphite, pen and black ink, and gray and black washes
François I Brandishing a Sword
by Alexandre-Evariste Fragonard
France, 19th century · c. 1815–30 · Pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash with graphite underdrawing and white and yellow gouache heightening on wove paper
Picturesque and Romantic Journeys in Old France: Ruins of the Palace of the White Queen
by Alexandre-Evariste Fragonard
France, 19th century · 1824 · lithograph
